case_title: RAY(RAYMOND)(RAYNALDO) TABORA et al VS. CARLOS L ANDRADE et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CARLOS ANDRADE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. CARLOS L ANDRADE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TABORA, RAY(RAYMOND)(RAYNALDO) TABORA, NOEMI L AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRADE, CARLOS L KARASIK, ALESYA DOES1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
